title: protium lucidum
intro: Protium lucidum, also known as the elemi tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The medicinal properties of Protium lucidum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as essential oil, resin, and tea, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
